'''foshangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucommiaceous|eucommiaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucommiaceous|eucommiaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| foshangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:foshangithi|foshangithi]] || [[word:foshangiji|foshangiji]] || [[word:foshangishi|foshangishi]] || [[word:foshangiki|foshangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:foshanguthuthu|foshanguthuthu]] || [[word:foshangujuju|foshangujuju]] || [[word:foshangushushu|foshangushushu]] || [[word:foshangukuku|foshangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:foshanguthu|foshanguthu]] || [[word:foshanguju|foshanguju]] || [[word:foshangushu|foshangushu]] || [[word:foshanguku|foshanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:foshangufthuf|foshangufthuf]] || [[word:foshangufjuf|foshangufjuf]] || [[word:foshangufshuf|foshangufshuf]] || [[word:foshangufkuf|foshangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:foshangethe|foshangethe]] || [[word:foshangeje|foshangeje]] || [[word:foshangeshe|foshangeshe]] || [[word:foshangeke|foshangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:foshangothotho|foshangothotho]] || [[word:foshangojojo|foshangojojo]] || [[word:foshangoshosho|foshangoshosho]] || [[word:foshangokoko|foshangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:foshangotho|foshangotho]] || [[word:foshangojo|foshangojo]] || [[word:foshangosho|foshangosho]] || [[word:foshangoko|foshangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:foshangofthof|foshangofthof]] || [[word:foshangofjof|foshangofjof]] || [[word:foshangofshof|foshangofshof]] || [[word:foshangofkof|foshangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfthĂŻf|foshangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfjĂŻf|foshangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfshĂŻf|foshangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfkĂŻf|foshangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|foshangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|foshangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|foshangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|foshangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfthĂŻf|foshangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfjĂŻf|foshangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfshĂŻf|foshangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfkĂŻf|foshangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfthĂŻf|foshangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfjĂŻf|foshangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfshĂŻf|foshangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:foshangĂŻfkĂŻf|foshangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:foshangĂŠthĂŠ|foshangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:foshangĂŠjĂŠ|foshangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:foshangĂŠshĂŠ|foshangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:foshangĂŠkĂŠ|foshangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:foshangathatha|foshangathatha]] || [[word:foshangajaja|foshangajaja]] || [[word:foshangashasha|foshangashasha]] || [[word:foshangakaka|foshangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:foshangatha|foshangatha]] || [[word:foshangaja|foshangaja]] || [[word:foshangasha|foshangasha]] || [[word:foshangaka|foshangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:foshangafthaf|foshangafthaf]] || [[word:foshangafjaf|foshangafjaf]] || [[word:foshangafshaf|foshangafshaf]] || [[word:foshangafkaf|foshangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:foshangasha|foshangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:foshangshĂ«sha|foshangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foshangrosha|foshangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foshangmusha|foshangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:foshangyasha|foshangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofoshangnkshĂ«sha|gofoshangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofoshangnkrosha|gofoshangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofoshangnkmusha|gofoshangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofoshangnkyasha|gofoshangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:foshashangasha|foshashangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:foshashangshĂ«sha|foshashangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foshashangrosha|foshashangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foshashangmusha|foshashangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:foshashangyasha|foshashangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofoshashangnkshĂ«sha|gofoshashangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofoshashangnkrosha|gofoshashangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofoshashangnkmusha|gofoshashangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofoshashangnkyasha|gofoshashangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:feshĂŠngasha|feshĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:feshĂŠngshĂ«sha|feshĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:feshĂŠngrosha|feshĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:feshĂŠngmusha|feshĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:feshĂŠngyasha|feshĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofeshĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gofeshĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofeshĂŠngnkrosha|gofeshĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofeshĂŠngnkmusha|gofeshĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofeshĂŠngnkyasha|gofeshĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:foshfangasha|foshfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:foshfangshĂ«sha|foshfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foshfangrosha|foshfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foshfangmusha|foshfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:foshfangyasha|foshfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofoshfangnkshĂ«sha|gofoshfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofoshfangnkrosha|gofoshfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofoshfangnkmusha|gofoshfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofoshfangnkyasha|gofoshfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
